description_long: This object is a sword with a gently curved, single-edged blade that tapers to a rounded point. The blade is metallic and has a smooth, reflective surface, typical of steel or iron. The handle is distinctively wrapped in a golden or brass-colored material, forming a looped guard that provides both protection and grip. The guard is integrated into the handle, creating a continuous, ornate spiral design. The sword lacks any visible engravings or additional ornamentation, giving it a functional yet slightly decorative appearance. Its proportions suggest it is a one-handed saber or cutlass, suitable for swift, slashing movements.
description: A curved, single-edged sword with a metallic blade and a gold-colored, spiral-wrapped handle with an integrated guard.
description_view_0: The sword is seen from the front, showing the full curve of the blade and the ornate, looped handle.
description_view_1: A side profile reveals the thinness of the blade and the compact, spiral design of the handle.
description_view_2: The back view displays the blade's curvature and the handle's looped guard from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Another side profile, mirroring view 1, emphasizing the blade's slimness and the handle's spiral structure.
attribute_handle_design: looped, spiral-wrapped, gold-colored handle with integrated guard
